interface_order_constraint: Interfaces from earlier PBs are not changed by later PBs; changes require explicit evidence.
notes: LOW_RISK maps to ALLOW; MEDIUM/HIGH map to HUMAN_REVIEW; UNKNOWN and missing policy fail closed.
purpose: Build decision, risk, and policy enforcement on top of PB-167 without changing PB-167 interfaces.
title: PB-168 VERIFIED: Decision Engine Risk Classifier Policy Enforcement

compile.summary: PASS using .venv/bin/python -m py_compile runtime/computer_use/*.py runtime/computer_use/providers/*.py; bare python unavailable in shell
